title: From struggling to consistency — grateful for the right people
author: Interesting_Ebb5313
selftext:
To be honest, I owe a large part of my success to a friend who invited me to a stock trading and sharing group

Every day, people in the group share their stock selection logic, risk warnings, key price levels, and market sentiment judgments, which has made my understanding of market trends much clearer and saved me from many detours

I'm not someone who watches the market every day, but through these exchanges, I can make better judgments in advance, rather than chasing highs or making emotional decisions.

Most importantly: all of this is completely free

The road ahead is long, but if you're heading in the right direction, compound interest will naturally occur

If you're also striving to reach your first million, I hope you'll meet the right people and the right circle of friends

If this sounds helpful to you, please leave a message or send me a private message, and I can invite you to join

Wishing everyone successful trading, let's move forward together!

comments.author: Arielle-Edwarea
comments.body: CAN I GET IN THE GROUP?

replies.author: Arielle-Edwarea
replies.body: Tx! I just sent you a message :)

replies.author: Calm-Initiative-8625
replies.body: could you please invite me too? :)

replies.author: sorvendral
replies.body: I want to join also if possible

replies.author: Interesting_Ebb5313
replies.body: Lol, I’ve shown positions MANY times. Btw, not shilling anything

replies.author: DifferentialEntropy
replies.body: What’s in it for you then?

comments.author: captthulkman
comments.body: What does this have to do with ai trading?

replies.author: Interesting_Ebb5313
replies.body: I believe we cannot rely solely on artificial intelligence we need to analyze and communicate together, and develop our own analytical methodology

replies.author: Connect_Date_4347
replies.body: No, you can't have my future cortana from halo gf.

comments.author: lorcstar
comments.body: Please send me an invite my friend

comments.author: Medical_Engineer1068
comments.body: Very interested. Need all the help I can get.

replies.author: Interesting_Ebb5313
replies.body: An invitation has been sent I hope this is helpful

comments.author: Moose-arent-real
comments.body: A story as old as time 😪

comments.author: ninjaschoolprofessor
comments.body: It honestly sounds like the 5,027 other scams where people try to get you to join a private discord channel. If it’s sooooo amazing why don’t these so called services show a proof of value and publish even 1% of their trades BEFORE they’re executed. LOL

replies.author: Cpolo88
replies.body: We should a be traders and market watchers then. Fuck being a doctor, a mechanic, a welder. Nope. Let's just all pay to learn to do stock trading and call it a day. Lovely scam

comments.author: floppypancakes4u
comments.body: If its completely free why not just post the invite?

comments.author: CipherAutotraderBot
comments.body: I don't about all this. It doesn't seem real!!

comments.author: zerifast
comments.body: And here they go, off to join the scam🤣
